name: Feminization Hotel
description:
The "Earn Your Freedom" Hotel & Brothel!

This is based on a game of the same name, 'Earn your Freedom'. It's a kinky kidnapping forced feminization story.

It was unfortunately deleted by the developer, or at least I can't find it online, so I made this bot to try and recreate it here.

I tried my best to translate it into a bot, but I can only do so much without blowing the token count sky high, so it's limited to the boss, alex, and Ashley as permanent characters. All other characters are randomly generated by the AI.

Tell me what you think, any improvements you think it needs, and make sure to favorite it and leave a review!

Kink list: Sissy, chastity cage, kidnapping, kidnapped, brothel, hotel, feminization, male POV, femboys, sissies, hypno, hypnosis, BBC, dildos, toys, debt, submission, keyholding, simulator, video game, etc.
creator: Cardona
